task: Design and implement the complete SAA 2025 database schema: 9 tables (profiles, kudos, hashtags, kudos_hashtags, kudos_images, awards, app_settings, nomination_periods, nominations, audit_logs), RLS policies, triggers, seed data, performance indexes, and TypeScript types
acceptanceCriteria: supabase db reset applies all 7 migrations without errors
nominations INSERT blocked outside nomination period at DB level
anonymous kudos sender_id not leaked in audit logs
hero_level updated automatically after kudos insert
npm run build passes with no TypeScript errors
src/types/database.types.ts exports all tables and views
blastRadius: No existing app code uses database types yet — new file, no regressions possible
contracts: Supabase Auth: profiles.id FK → auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
RLS: authenticated role required for all table access
Triggers: SECURITY DEFINER set search_path = '' on all trigger functions
